response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including native-level Japanese proficiency, C programming experience in UNIX/embedded environments, Linux kernel modification experience, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development — all essential for this security-focused embedded role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including open-source projects
Demonstrated expertise in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of C programming for embedded or UNIX systems
Zero mention of Japanese language proficiency or experience
Lacks any exposure to LAN-switch firmware, network security protocols, or embedded hardware control

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or switch firmware background
